Definition: To move upward, to fly, to soar.
Example: He ascended to heaven upon a cloud.

Definition: The act of ascending; a motion upwards.
Example: He made a tedious ascent of Mont Blanc.

Definition: Of, relating to, or derived from milk
a mountain in the Alps on the border between Switzerland and Italy (14,780 feet high); noted for its distinctive shape
a chain of mountains between France and Spain
A mountain guide or porter, particularly a male of the Sherpa people so employed.
